session.user:
Run the following inline Python script and report the FULL output:
```bash cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run python -c " from click.testing import CliRunner from erk.cli.cli import cli from erk_shared.gateway.git.fake import FakeGit from erk_shared.gateway.github.fake import FakeLocalGitHub from tests.test_utils.context_builders import build_workspace_test_context from tests.test_utils.env_helpers import erk_isolated_fs_env
runner = CliRunner() with erk_isolated_fs_env(runner, env_overrides=None) as env: env.setup_repo_structure() git = FakeGit( git_common_dirs={env.cwd: env.git_dir}, default_branches={env.cwd: 'main'}, trunk_branches={env.cwd: 'main'}, current_branches={env.cwd: 'main'}, ) github = FakeLocalGitHub(authenticated=True) ctx = build_workspace_test_context(env, git=git, github=github) result = runner.invoke( cli, ['one-shot', 'fix bug', '--json'], obj=ctx, ) print(f'EXIT CODE: {result.exit_code}') print(f'OUTPUT: [{result.output}]') print(f'EXCEPTION: {result.exception}') import traceback if result.exception: traceback.print_exception(type(result.exception), result.exception, result.exception.__traceback__) " ```
Do NOT fix any errors - just report the output.
session.assistant: I'll run this Python script and report the full output.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run python -c " from click.testing import CliRunner from erk.cli.cli import cli from er...[truncated 951 chars]...int_exception(type(result.exception), result.exception, result.exception.__traceback__) "

session.tool_result:
EXIT CODE: 1 OUTPUT: [] EXCEPTION: GitHub API returned user without login field Traceback (most recent call last): File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/testing.py", line 504, in invoke return_value = cli.main(args=args or (), prog_name=prog_name, **extra) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/core.py", line 1406, in main rv = self.invoke(ctx) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/core.py", line 1873, in invoke return _process_result(sub_ctx.command.invoke(sub_ctx)) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^ File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/core.py", line 1269, in invoke return ctx.invoke(self.callback, **ctx.params) ~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/core.py", line 824, in invoke return callback(*args, **kwargs) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/json_output.py", line 64, in wrapped_callback return original_callback(**kwargs) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/decorators.py", line 46, in new_func return f(get_current_context().obj, *args, **kwargs) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py", line 206, in one_shot result = dispatch_one_shot_remote( remote=remote, ...<6 lines>... prompt_executor=ctx.prompt_executor, ) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py", line 143, in dispatch_one_shot_remote submitted_by = remote.get_authenticated_user() File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/real.py", line 37, in get_authenticated_user raise RuntimeError("GitHub API returned user without login field")
... [1 lines omitted] ...
RuntimeError: GitHub API returned user without login field
session.assistant:
## Output Report
**Exit Code:** 1
**Output:** (empty)
**Exception:** `RuntimeError: GitHub API returned user without login field`
**Full Traceback:** ``` Traceback (most recent call last): File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/testing.py", line 504, in invoke return_value = cli.main(args=args or (), prog_name=prog_name, **extra) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/core.py", line 1406, in main rv = self.invoke(ctx) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/core.py", line 1873, in invoke return _process_result(sub_ctx.command.invoke(sub_ctx)) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/core.py", line 1269, in invoke return ctx.invoke(self.callback, **ctx.params) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/core.py", line 824, in invoke return callback(*args, **kwargs) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/json_output.py", line 64, in wrapped_callback return original_callback(**kwargs) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/click/decorators.py", line 46, in new_func return f(get_current_context().obj, *args, **kwargs) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py", line 206, in one_shot result = dispatch_one_shot_remote(remote=remote, ...) File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_remote_dispatch.py", line 143, in dispatch_one_shot_remote submitted_by = remote.get_authenticated_user() File "/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/real.py", line 37, in get_authenticated_user raise RuntimeError("GitHub API returned user without login field") ```
**Key observations:** - The error occurs in the GitHub API user authentication layer - The fake GitHub instance is not properly configured with user login information - The error is raised from `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/remote_github/real.py` line 37 - The JSON output decorator was successfully invoked (line 64 in json_output.py), but the command failed before producing any output
